label: NON-CANONICAL: regenerated with public VGGT; not an official paper reproduction

input.resize: Pillow bicubic; width 518; aspect-preserving; center crop only if height exceeds 518
input.alpha_background: source RGB PNGs are already white-background RGB; VGGT loader also composites RGBA onto white

multiview.batch_membership_and_order: recovered exactly from intact pickle tensor storage offsets and shared storage-prefix hashes in the official corrupt .pth archives

inference.gpu: physical GPU 0, NVIDIA RTX A5000 24 GB

known_irreducible_differences_from_paper: The authors did not publish the VGGT commit, checkpoint revision, generation script, preprocessing command, random/runtime settings, or serialization code used for their priors.
This diagnostic uses the currently public VGGT commit and public VGGT-1B checkpoint revision pinned above; equivalence to the unpublished author generation environment cannot be established.
The current VGGT commit includes a later memory-retention change and an 8-frame DPT-head chunk implementation, while global aggregation still sees each recovered 20-view group jointly.
PyTorch 2.5.1+cu118 is used instead of VGGT's declared torch 2.3.1 environment.
Only batch membership/order is recoverable from the corrupt official archives; the missing official tensor payload and its exact numeric values cannot be recovered.
